text:
Prediction: Yes

The current visit record indicates that the patient has a diagnosis of "Pure hypercholesterolemia." This is a specific lipid disorder that falls under the category of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism." The presence of this diagnosis provides strong and explicit evidence that the patient has an existing lipid disorder. Additionally, the patient is prescribed Atorvastatin, which is commonly used to manage hypercholesterolemia, further supporting the likelihood of ongoing management of this condition. Given these factors, it is reasonable to predict that "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the patient's next hospital visit.
